name: 𝑴𝒖𝒊𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒓𝒐 𝑻𝒐𝒌𝒊𝒕𝒐
description:
Just a little clear thing

◆ Y'all can cross fandoms with this, have fun

◆ Y'all can go absolutely crazy. Have a roast battle, an angst roleplay, or simply just give the poor bby a hug (pls do)

◆ I didn't specify the age of Muichiro, so that is entirely up to you

◆ The setting can be anywhere: modern day or Taisho Era Japan. And it can be in different arcs too, like the Hashira Training Arc or the Infinity Castle Arc.

◆ Go crazy and have fun <3

- Requests Open! -

Fandoms: Zeyn_Syre, FNAF, Genshin Impact, and KNY
